meta.description: Manage and query group memories through @bot
error.group_only: This feature can only be used in groups.
error.modify_denied: You can ask questions or view memories, but you cannot modify group memories.
prompt.add_missing: Please tell me what to save after mentioning me.
prompt.delete_missing: Please tell me which memory to delete, or give a MEM-id directly.
prompt.update_missing_target: Please tell me which memory to modify, or give a MEM-id directly.
prompt.update_missing_content: Please tell me what the memory should be updated to.
prompt.empty_after_mention: Please put a concrete request after mentioning me.
status.answering: Searching group memories and preparing an answer...
label.title: Title: {title}
result.list_empty: There are no group memories yet.
result.list_header: There are {count} memories in this group:
result.delete_empty: There are no memories to delete.
result.update_empty: There are no memories to update.
result.multiple_matches: Matched multiple memories. Please use a more specific keyword or a MEM-id:
result.multiple_matches_update: Matched multiple memories. Please use a more specific keyword or a MEM-id for update:
qa.empty: There are no group memories yet, so I can't answer from memory.
qa.no_match: No matching group memory was found, so I can't answer only from group memories.
qa.ai_failed:
I found related memories, but AI failed:
{bullets}
